title: Shankh Air
summary:
Shankh Air is an Indian full-service regional airline company planning to serve the flight routes in Uttar Pradesh. It is authorized by Ministry of Civil Aviation under UDAN scheme to enhance regional connectivity in the country. As of December 2025, there were nine operational scheduled domestic carriers in Indian aviation sector.
Initial report suggests that this domestic airline carrier will operate from Gorakhpur, Lucknow & Varanasi with flights scheduled to commence in first quarter of 2026.
text:
Shankh Air is an Indian full-service regional airline company planning to serve the flight routes in Uttar Pradesh. It is authorized by Ministry of Civil Aviation under UDAN scheme to enhance regional connectivity in the country. As of December 2025, there were nine operational scheduled domestic carriers in Indian aviation sector.
Initial report suggests that this domestic airline carrier will operate from Gorakhpur, Lucknow & Varanasi with flights scheduled to commence in first quarter of 2026.
